title: 2016 Dimension
description:
A mod that add 2016 things to Minecraft (new dimension, tools, weapons, mob, block, armors)
(2016 dimension mod from one of my video)
body:
# 🆕 Mod Features:

A mod that add some of **2016** things, like a new mob with the 2016 kikoo skin, a new dimension, (there's also new tools (can be obtain with new mob), weapons, block, armors, structures...)

it took me a few weeks/months, (so it's normal if it's not perfect :) )

# 🔴 Original video (it's where the mod comes from):
### The elytra armor has been removed beacause it was bugged
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/u2YQ5yvP5Mk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


_you are free to put this mod in a modpack as long as you credit it in the modpack description :)._


# ⚙️ How to make it work?:
You need Minecraft in **1.20.6** with the Mod Loader **NeoForged**.
